title: Durability Bar
description: A lightweight, simple, non-intrusive indicator for your item's health.
body:
# Durability Bar A lightweight, simple, non-intrusive indicator for your item's health that utilizes the lower portion of the XP bar to track the health of the item you're currently holding. ## ♻️ **Compatibility** **Durability Bar is designed to be compatible with all mods.** ❗❗ For compatibility with Raised, you'll need to download + use this Resource Pack. **Durability Bar is compatible with all Resource Packs with the appropriate tweaks.** Durability Bar can be tweaked to your heart's desire by editing `durability_bar.png`, which should be located under `assets/durabilitybar/textures/gui/durability_bar.png`. The bar cannot be any wider than it currently is, however, it is freely adjustable [vertically]. ❗❗ For custom compatibility with Raised, you'll need to move the entirety of `durability_bar.png` up by 2 pixels. ✔️ Durability Bar supports less-than-opaque opacity. ## 🤝 **Credits**
  • intwined for the idea
  • Tiviacz1337 for creating the mod
## ⚖️ **Rights** ✔️ **You are welcome to use this mod in your modpack.** ❌ **You are NOT permitted to edit, modify, or redistribute this mod in any other way.**
